subject: Automating document collection during tax season
body:
Hi,

I came across Drennan & Associates and noticed you serve small businesses and individuals in the Nashville area. Tax season means chasing clients for documents, and that eats up hours every week.

We help CPA firms set up automated document request portals. Each client gets a personalized checklist, automatic reminders, and a secure upload link. Your team stops sending follow-up emails and clients actually get their documents in on time.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
